message:
Implement wizard Step 4: Rent a VPS

- Provider cards for OVH, Contabo, Hetzner with expandable details
- Spec checklist (CPU, RAM, storage recommendations)
- Links to provider signup pages
- Note about other providers compatibility

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.4","title":"Implement wizard Step 1: OS Selection (Mac/Windows)","description":"# Task: Implement Wizard Step 1 - OS Selection

## Description
Create the first wizard step where users choose their operating system (Mac or Windows).

## Page Copy
**Title:** What computer are you using?
**Subtitle:** This helps us show you the right commands.

**Options:**
- 🍎 **Mac** - macOS, MacBook, iMac, Mac Mini, Mac Studio
- 🪟 **Windows** - Windows 10, Windows 11

## Technical Details
- Store selection in localStorage as `acfs_os`
- Store in URL as `?os=mac` or `?os=windows`
- Large clickable cards for each option
- Auto-advance on selection

## Route
`/wizard/os/page.tsx`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Two clear options: Mac and Windows
- [ ] Selection stored in localStorage
- [ ] Selection reflected in URL
- [ ] Auto-advances to step 2
- [ ] Can return and change selection
- [ ] Mobile-friendly touch targets","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:22:55.647302-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:48:15.049301-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:48:15.049301-05:00","close_reason":"Closed","labels":["task","website","wizard-step"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.4","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:22:55.649137-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.5","title":"Implement wizard Step 2: Install Terminal","description":"# Task: Implement Wizard Step 2 - Install Terminal

## Description
Guide users to install a good terminal application based on their OS selection.

## Page Copy

### Mac Version
**Title:** Install a terminal you'll actually like
**Body:** 
Install **Ghostty** or **WezTerm** (either is fine).
Open it once after installing.

**Links:**
- [Download Ghostty](https://ghostty.org/download)
- [Download WezTerm](https://wezfurlong.org/wezterm/installation.html)

**Note:** macOS already includes SSH, so you're ready to go.

### Windows Version
**Title:** Install Windows Terminal
**Body:**
Install **Windows Terminal** from the Microsoft Store.
Open it once after installing.

**Link:** [Get Windows Terminal](ms-windows-store://pdp/?ProductId=9N0DX20HK701)

**Verify:** Run this in the terminal:
```powershell
ssh -V
```
You should see a version number.

## Technical Details
- OS-aware content rendering
- External links open in new tab
- Optional verification command

## Route
`/wizard/terminal/page.tsx`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Shows correct content based on OS
- [ ] Download links work
- [ ] Verification step for Windows
- [ ] "I installed it" button advances","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:08.838021-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:49:33.451126-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:49:33.451126-05:00","close_reason":"Closed","labels":["task","website","wizard-step"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.5","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:08.839785-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.6","title":"Implement wizard Step 3: Generate SSH Key","description":"# Task: Implement Wizard Step 3 - Generate SSH Key

## Description
Guide users through generating an SSH key pair and copying their public key.

## Page Copy
**Title:** Create your SSH key (this is your "login key")
**Body:**
You're going to create a key pair. You will paste the **public key** into your VPS provider.

### Generate the key
**Mac:**
```bash
ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "acfs" -f ~/.ssh/acfs_ed25519
```

**Windows (PowerShell):**
```powershell
ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "acfs" -f $HOME\.ssh\acfs_ed25519
```

Press Enter twice when asked for a passphrase (leave it empty).

### Copy your public key
**Mac:**
```bash
cat ~/.ssh/acfs_ed25519.pub
```

**Windows:**
```powershell
type $HOME\.ssh\acfs_ed25519.pub
```

**Action:** Copy the entire output (starts with `ssh-ed25519 ...`)

## Technical Details
- Two CommandCard components (generate, copy)
- OS-aware commands
- Emphasize copying the .pub file

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Clear two-step process
- [ ] OS-specific commands shown
- [ ] Copy buttons on both commands
- [ ] "I copied my public key" checkbox
- [ ] Troubleshooting for common errors","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:21.636553-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:50:52.605731-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:50:52.605731-05:00","close_reason":"Closed","labels":["task","website","wizard-step"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.6","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:21.639421-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.7","title":"Implement wizard Step 4: Rent a VPS","description":"# Task: Implement Wizard Step 4 - Rent a VPS

## Description
Guide users to rent a VPS from a supported provider with appropriate specs.

## Page Copy
**Title:** Rent a VPS (~$50/month sweet spot)
**Body:**
Pick a VPS provider and rent a server. This is where your coding agents will live.

### Recommended Providers
- **OVH** - European, good value
- **Contabo** - Budget-friendly, high specs
- **Hetzner** - Developer favorite
- **Other** - Any provider with Ubuntu VPS works

### What to choose
- **OS:** Ubuntu 25.x (or newest Ubuntu available)
- **CPU:** 4-8 vCPU
- **RAM:** 8-16 GB
- **Storage:** 100GB+ NVMe SSD
- **Price:** ~$50/month is the sweet spot

### Important
- Make sure "SSH key login" is available
- You'll paste your public key in the next step

## Technical Details
- Provider cards that expand with specific guidance
- Checklist of what to select
- Links to signup pages

## Components
- ProviderChooser with expandable cards
- Checklist component

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Provider cards with logos
- [ ] Expandable provider-specific guidance
- [ ] Clear spec recommendations
- [ ] Links to provider signup
- [ ] "I rented a VPS" advances","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:33.751033-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:33.751033-05:00","labels":["task","website","wizard-step"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.7","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:33.75301-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.8","title":"Implement wizard Steps 5-7: Create VPS, SSH In, Paste Installer","description":"# Task: Implement Wizard Steps 5-7

## Description
Implement the core VPS setup steps:
- Step 5: Create VPS and attach SSH key
- Step 6: SSH into your VPS
- Step 7: Paste the ACFS one-liner

## Step 5: Create VPS + Attach SSH Key
**Title:** Create your VPS and add your SSH key
**Content:**
1. Select Ubuntu 25.x as the OS image
2. Find "SSH Keys" section
3. Paste your public key (the one you copied earlier)
4. Create the server
5. Copy the IP address shown

Checklist:
- [ ] Selected Ubuntu image
- [ ] Pasted my SSH public key
- [ ] Server created
- [ ] I have the IP address

## Step 6: SSH In
**Title:** Connect to your VPS
**Command (Mac):**
```bash
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -i ~/.ssh/acfs_ed25519 ubuntu@YOUR_IP
```

**Command (Windows):**
```powershell
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -i $HOME\.ssh\acfs_ed25519 ubuntu@YOUR_IP
```

**Note:** If `ubuntu@` fails, try `root@` instead.

## Step 7: Paste the ACFS One-Liner
**Title:** Paste the magic command
**Command:**
```bash
curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/main/install.sh?$(date +%s)" | bash -s -- --yes --mode vibe
```

**What this will do:**
- Create/enforce ubuntu user with passwordless sudo
- Install your full toolchain (shell, languages, agents)
- Install the Dicklesworthstone stack (all 8 tools)
- End by telling you what to type next

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Step 5: Provider-agnostic guidance
- [ ] Step 6: IP input field to customize command
- [ ] Step 7: Big, prominent command card
- [ ] Troubleshooting sections for common issues","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:48.826787-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T22:36:40.547518-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T22:36:40.547521-05:00","labels":["task","website","wizard-step"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.8","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:23:48.828541-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.9","title":"Implement wizard Steps 8-10: Reconnect, Status, Onboard","description":"# Task: Implement Wizard Steps 8-10

## Description
Complete the final wizard steps:
- Step 8: Reconnect as ubuntu
- Step 9: ACFS Status Check
- Step 10: Run onboard

## Step 8: Reconnect as Ubuntu
**Title:** Reconnect as ubuntu
**Body:**
If you installed while logged in as `root`, reconnect as `ubuntu`:
```bash
exit
ssh -i ~/.ssh/acfs_ed25519 ubuntu@YOUR_IP
```

**Skip if:** Already logged in as ubuntu

## Step 9: ACFS Status Check
**Title:** Verify your VPS is ready (one command)
**Body:**
Run this on your VPS:
```bash
acfs doctor
```

**What you should see:**
A checklist with lots of `PASS ✅` lines.

**Interactive checklist** - shows all installed tools:
- Identity & permissions
- Shell setup
- Core tools
- Coding agents
- Cloud/DB tools
- Dicklesworthstone stack

**Optional:** Paste JSON output for auto-check

## Step 10: Run Onboard + Start Vibe Coding
**Title:** You're ready! Start the tutorial
**Command:**
```bash
onboard
```

**Quick reference:**
- `cc` - Claude Code
- `cod` - Codex CLI
- `gmi` - Gemini CLI
- `ntm` - Named Tmux Manager
- `cass` - Session search
- `cm` - Memory system
- `ubs` - Bug scanner
- `bv` - Beads viewer

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Step 8: Skip option for non-root users
- [ ] Step 9: Full status checklist display
- [ ] Step 9: Optional JSON paste auto-check
- [ ] Step 10: Celebration UI (confetti?)
- [ ] Step 10: Quick reference card","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:04.4838-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T22:36:41.482071-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T22:36:41.482073-05:00","labels":["task","website","wizard-step"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad.9","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-yad","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:04.48597-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
